metadata.title: Design and deploy a research agent prompt for a content system that enables a founder-operator in Canada to generate, curate, and validate content assets using an operator lens, with explicit validation gates to ensure policy compliance and claim limits.

mission.primary_objective: Design and deploy a research agent prompt for a content system that enables a founder-operator in Canada to generate, curate, and validate content assets using an operator lens, with explicit validation gates to ensure policy compliance and claim limits.
mission.success_definition: Research agent prompt produces a structured research report with at least 3 sources per content topic.; Validation gates flag any claim exceeding predefined limits (e.g., 'cures disease' triggers block).; Schema_blur input is resolved without user intervention in >90% of test cases.; Output contract is machine-parseable and includes source_policy_and_claim_limits compliance evidence.

in_scope.item: The research agent prompt must accept ambiguous, partial, and urgent input (schema_blur), resolve missing context via default heuristics, and produce structured research outputs that feed into content generation. The system must operate within Canadian content regulations and platform-specific claim limits.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 1
gate.pass_condition: Research agent prompt produces a structured research report with at least 3 sources per content topic.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 2
gate.pass_condition: Validation gates flag any claim exceeding predefined limits (e.g., 'cures disease' triggers block).

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 3
gate.pass_condition: Schema_blur input is resolved without user intervention in >90% of test cases.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 4
gate.pass_condition: Output contract is machine-parseable and includes source_policy_and_claim_limits compliance evidence.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

SRXML_Artifact.research_question: Design and deploy a research agent prompt for a content system that enables a founder-operator in Canada to generate, curate, and validate content assets using an operator lens, with explicit validation gates to ensure policy compliance and claim limits.
SRXML_Artifact.search_strategy: The research agent prompt must accept ambiguous, partial, and urgent input (schema_blur), resolve missing context via default heuristics, and produce structured research outputs that feed into content generation. The system must operate within Canadian content regulations and platform-specific claim limits.
SRXML_Artifact.evidence_standard: Record evidence limits and cite available sources.
SRXML_Artifact.citation_rules: Cite every external claim when external research is used.
SRXML_Artifact.final_report_contract: format: JSON; fields: research_summary: string (max 2000 chars); sources: array of objects (url, credibility_score, date); claim_audit: array of objects (claim_text, limit_status, policy_reference); validation_gates: array of objects (gate_name, passed, evidence); compliance_evidence: object (policy_version, claim_limits_applied, jurisdiction); validation_rules: All claims must be within Canadian claim limits (e.g., no therapeutic claims without Health Canada approval).; Sources must have credibility_score >= 0.7.; Validation gates must all pass before output is released.

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: No blocked state recorded by SR8 at render time.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
